{"id":"ci-g57","title":"Fracture plane analysis skill","description":"## What
Build the logic that reads strategy JTBDs, evals, and codebase to propose 2-3 genuinely different ways to slice a product into workstreams.

## Why
Moves FR-001a: Given strategy + evals, propose 2-3 fracture planes with trade-offs.
Without this, workstreams must be manually defined — defeating the Autonomy principle.

## Context
- Files: strategy.md, evals.json, product codebase
- APIs: none
- Prior tasks: none (first task)
- Shared resources: strategy.md (read-only)

## Done When
- [ ] Reads strategy.md and evals.json
- [ ] Proposes 2-3 fracture planes (e.g., by JTBD, by journey phase, by technical surface)
- [ ] Each option includes rationale and trade-offs
- [ ] Quality gate: typecheck && lint && test all pass

## Eval Spec
Given: A product with strategy.md containing 3+ JTBDs and evals.json
When: The onboarding skill runs
Then: 2-3 fracture plane options are presented with rationale

## Circuit Breakers
- 3 test failures on same error → STOP
- >5 files → STOP, task too broad","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Michael Haase","owner":"haase210482@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-27T11:54:59Z","created_by":"Michael Haase","updated_at":"2026-03-27T12:41:14Z"}

new_value: Fracture plane analysis module complete. 4 files: package.json, tsconfig.json, src/fracture-planes.ts, src/fracture-planes.test.ts. Reads strategy.md + evals.json, proposes 3 planes (by-jtbd, by-journey-phase, by-technical-surface) with rationale and trade-offs. Fuzzy JTBD matching handles frontmatter/eval title mismatches. 19/19 tests pass, typecheck clean.

old_value:
{"id":"ci-b30","title":"Directory scaffolding for workstreams","description":"## What
Given a selected fracture plane, create the workstream directory structure with goal.md, ideas-backlog.md, and .claude/CLAUDE.md per workstream.

## Why
Moves FR-001b: Create goal.md + backlog + CLAUDE.md per workstream on confirmation.

## Context
- Files: workstreams/[name]/goal.md, ideas-backlog.md, .claude/CLAUDE.md
- Prior tasks: Fracture plane analysis
- Shared resources: none

## Done When
- [ ] Creates workstreams/[name]/ directory per workstream
- [ ] goal.md template: human prose, strategic direction
- [ ] ideas-backlog.md template: empty, structured hypothesis format documented
- [ ] .claude/CLAUDE.md template: wiring to goal.md, evals, backlog
- [ ] Quality gate: typecheck && lint && test all pass

## Eval Spec
Given: User selects "by JTBD" fracture plane with 3 workstreams
When: Confirmed
Then: 3 directories exist with goal.md + backlog + CLAUDE.md each

## Circuit Breakers
- 3 test failures on same error → STOP
- >5 files → STOP","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"haase210482@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-27T11:54:59Z","created_by":"Michael Haase","updated_at":"2026-03-27T11:54:59Z"}
